attempts.test_code:
import threading
from source import bitcount

def test_bitcount_multiple_ones():
    result = [None]
    
    def execute():
        result[0] = bitcount(127)
    
    thread = threading.Thread(target=execute)
    thread.daemon = True
    thread.start()
    thread.join(timeout=1)
    
    assert not thread.is_alive(), "bitcount(127) hangs - bit-clearing with XOR is broken"
    assert result[0] == 7, "bitcount(127) should return 7 (binary 01111111 has seven 1-bits)"
